# Project notes for Claude

## Do not edit index.html directly

`index.html` is a generated file — it is regenerated by `generate_releases.py` before every push (via `.githooks/pre-push`). Any direct edits will be overwritten.

All HTML, CSS, and JavaScript changes must be made in `template.html`. Run `python3 generate_releases.py` to rebuild `index.html` from the template.
